scripts.prebuild: npx expo prebuild --clean && echo 'export NODE_BINARY='$(which node) > ./ios/.xcode.env.local
scripts.build-eas:ios: npm run test && eas build -p ios
scripts.build-eas-then-submit:ios: npm run test && eas build -p ios && eas submit -p ios --latest
scripts.build-eas:android-aab: npm run test && eas build -p android
scripts.build-local:ios-ipa: npm run test && eas build -p ios --local
scripts.build-local-then-submit:ios-ipa: npm run test && eas build -p ios --local && eas submit -p ios
scripts.build-and-upload:ios: npm run test && eas build -p ios --local --output ./build.ipa && xcrun altool --upload-app -f ./build.ipa -t ios --apiKey XL8CVZ236D --apiIssuer fb7f60f9-a619-47bb-8ed7-9bb153f26518 && rm ./build.ipa
scripts.build-and-upload:android: npm run test && eas build -p android --local --output ./build.aab && fastlane supply --aab ./build.aab --json_key ~/.googleplayconsole/service-account.json --track production --package_name com.nikicoach.app && rm ./build.aab
scripts.build-local:ios-ipa:debug: echo "This script retains XCode logs for debugging build failures. Look for a message like 'Skipping cleanup, {path/to/logs} won't be removed.'" && /bin/sh -c 'export $(grep -v ^'#' .env.production | xargs) && EAS_LOCAL_BUILD_SKIP_CLEANUP=1 eas build -p ios --local
scripts.build-local:android-aab: npm run test && eas build -p android --local
